leadText: The Hard Stone (Japanese: かたいいし Hard Stone) is a type of held item introduced in Generation II that boosts the power of Rock-type moves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations II and III [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Rock-type moves by 10%. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Rock-type moves by 20%.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C Powers up rock-type moves. (HOLD) R S E Colo XD A hold item that raises the power of Rock -type moves. FR LG An item to be held by a Pok é mon . An unbreakable stone that boosts the power of Rock -type moves. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is an unbreakable stone that ups the power of Rock-type moves. X Y OR AS An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a durable stone that boosts the power of Rock-type moves. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a durable stone that boosts the power of Rock-type moves. S V ZA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a durable stone that boosts the power of the holder's Rock-type moves.
